title: Error: Worksheet name already exists: My Sheet
author: useralive003

comments.body: I am having the same issue.

comments.author: samwanderman
kBien
comments.body:
One could also change the `Array.find()` method into `Array.some()`.

###### *Still an issue as of Jan 20, 2020, exceljs@3.6.0*

comments.author: nithin-pb
comments.body:
The issue still there in exceljs@4.2.1.
any workaround for this issue?

Works fine for v1.0.0

comments.author: wellyal
comments.body: This is still an issue with version exceljs@4.2.1 why is this still closed? Is the project dead?

comments.author: IvanShirokikh
comments.body: Hi stumbled upon the same problem as I found out the problem occurs when there is a [collections](https://github.com/montagejs/collections) library with version lower than 5.1.0. There's a redefinition of the array [find](https://github.com/montagejs/collections/blob/v5.0.7/shim-array.js#L135) method that returns -1 if the lookup is missing.

comments.author: skypesky
comments.body:
@IvanShirokikh 
Do you have the wrong test code?

comments.author: jaemyunlee
comments.body: @IvanShirokikh already explained. but I want to elaborate on what happened in my team. Suddenly my team had the same error. It turned out that we had imported [excel-export](https://www.npmjs.com/package/excel-export) library and it uses old version collections library. Exceljs library(4.3.0) was not problem in our situation.
